programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: From the bone-dry deserts of the Atacama, where penguins weave their way through a minefield of snapping sea lions, to the lush cloud forests of the Andes, South America is full of unusual and ingenious wildlife.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: U.S. soldiers encounter heavy fire while trying to capture a warlord's associates in Mogadishu, Somalia.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie jeopardizes Alan's divorce settlement by sleeping with his attorney, Laura (Heather Locklear).

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie attempts to cure Alan of his recent bout of sleepwalking; Jake sees a therapist (Jane Lynch).

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie tries to sweet talk Judith's divorcee support-group into letting Jake continue to spend weekends at his place.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan learns that Charlie belongs to an exclusive men's group, and he begs his brother to let him join.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Judith is dating Jake's pediatrician (Ryan Stiles), and Alan is upset until Charlie points out that if she remarries, his alimony payments will end.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie tries to save Jake from school suspension by romancing his teacher, but the results are unfortunate.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie's mother, Evelyn, asks to borrow his Mercedes so she can impress a Saudi prince who she wants to buy real estate.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie meets his match when he falls for a woman who is better at playing hard to get than he is.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan denies having shoplifted a toy as a child and fears he has a dark side, until Charlie admits he planted the toy on Alan to stay out of trouble himself.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan hire Berta's sister (Camryn Manheim) to cater a party their mother has conned them into throwing for her.

programme.title: Commando
programme.desc: A human killing machine (Arnold Schwarzenegger) and an airline hostess (Rae Dawn Chong) take on an ousted dictator's (Dan Hedaya) private army.

programme.title: Predator
programme.desc: On a mission in a Central American jungle, a team of commandos headed by Major Dutch Schaefer find themselves hunted by a fierce extra-terrestrial warrior.

programme.title: The Fifth Element
programme.desc: The Earth is about to be destroyed by a huge ball of fire racing toward the planet. Cornelius, an old monk, knows how to stop the burning sphere with the help of Korben Dallas, a taxi driver and former secret agent and a woman named Leeloo.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a promising mathematician who was involved in a turbulent relationship with a college professor.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis become entangled in the Russian mafia while investigating two murders with a speechless child as the only witness.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy must link jailed Russian mob suspects to money laundering and murder before their release on technicalities.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy aims to prosecute both the suspect and the gun manufacturer after a shooting spree in Central Park kills 15 people.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives suspect a 10-year-old girl is responsible for the death of a boy at a construction site.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A judge maintains her husband's innocence after a botched murder attempt leaves her mortally wounded.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A scandal involving two wealthy families threatens McCoy and Carmichael's chances of a conviction in the murder of a drug-addicted girl of 15.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: Questions about how animals adapt to the worlds built by the planet's most invasive species, humans; a search for loot to steal with macaques in Bali; hunting for easy eats with bears in Lake Tahoe; whale poo help fish populations bounce back.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: Animals fight to survive extremes, from tundra to deserts, mountain summits to deep underground.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: Exploring forests as hidden worlds where the lives of animals are entwined, including temperate forests home to whistling wild dogs, as well as rainforests where ninja treehoppers fight off assassin bugs.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Mexico
programme.desc: A corrupt CIA agent (Johnny Depp) recruits a tormented gunman (Antonio Banderas) to stop conspirators from assassinating the president of Mexico.

programme.title: Commando
programme.desc: A human killing machine (Arnold Schwarzenegger) and an airline hostess (Rae Dawn Chong) take on an ousted dictator's (Dan Hedaya) private army.

programme.title: Weird Science
programme.desc: Gary and Wyatt design their ideal woman on a computer, and a freak electrical accident brings her to life in the form of the lovely, superhuman Lisa.

programme.title: The Fifth Element
programme.desc: The Earth is about to be destroyed by a huge ball of fire racing toward the planet. Cornelius, an old monk, knows how to stop the burning sphere with the help of Korben Dallas, a taxi driver and former secret agent and a woman named Leeloo.

programme.title: Spaceballs
programme.desc: President Skroob (Mel Brooks) pits evil Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) against Lone Starr and the half-man, half-dog Barf (John Candy).

programme.title: Highlander
programme.desc: A New Yorker (Christopher Lambert) beheads a swordsman in a parking lot, continuing a battle of immortals.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy opposes his former colleague, Jamie Ross, in the murder of another attorney for which a man may be wrongly convicted.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe, resentful at being second-guessed by fellow officers, feuds with Green over an exasperating murder case.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Even with key DNA evidence, a new witness jeopardizes the conviction of a man suspected of bludgeoning a woman into a coma.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green think a life insurance salesman's valuable information about his policies was a motive for his murder.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green track a gigolo and con artist who is suspected of murder, but they run into problems when McCoy and Carmichael interview a victim's family.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a teenager is found murdered, Detectives Briscoe and Green suspect a school bully who displays an avid interest in martial-arts weapons.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A mentally disturbed suspect refuses to take his antidepressant medicine, rendering him incapable of standing trial for murder.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: The Faulkner Focus
programme.desc: Emmy-winning journalist Harris Faulkner provides the latest news with insightful analysis and interviews with top newsmakers.

programme.title: Outnumbered
programme.desc: Four female panelists and one male colleague share their perspectives on the day's top news stories.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: The Story With Martha MacCallum
programme.desc: Martha MacCallum brings the story of the times with her tough but fair interviews and straightforward analysis;

programme.title: The Will Cain Show
programme.desc: Featuring Cain's signature podcast style and thoughtful perspective through conversations with newsmakers across politics, culture and sports.

programme.title: The Five
programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.title: Special Report With Bret Baier
programme.desc: Former Fox News chief White House correspondent Bret Baier takes a closer look at political stories from Washington, DC.

programme.title: The Ingraham Angle
programme.desc: Laura Ingraham aims to cut through the Washington chatter to speak directly with unexpected voices and the actual people who are impacted by the news of the day.

programme.title: Jesse Watters Primetime
programme.desc: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across the U.S. to present news with a clear and direct approach.

programme.title: Hannity
programme.desc: Sean Hannity interviews political figures and newsmakers and offers his own conservative perspective on events.

programme.title: Gutfeld!
programme.desc: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

programme.title: Fox News at Night
programme.desc: Hard news and analysis of compelling stories from DC and across the country; journalists provide viewers with must-see information and consequential news.

programme.title: The Five
programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.desc: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across the U.S. to present news with a clear and direct approach.

programme.title: Fox News at Night
programme.desc: Hard news and analysis of compelling stories from DC and across the country; journalists provide viewers with must-see information and consequential news.

programme.title: FOX & Friends First
programme.desc: Hosts Todd Piro and Carley Shimkus present all the headlines viewers may have missed overnight, along with a preview of upcoming news events.

programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: Socialism in America
programme.desc: Experts and former citizens of communist and socialist countries discuss socialism in America by sharing historical similarities and personal experiences.

programme.title: First Edition
programme.desc: The host presents a round-up of the latest social, political and economic news updates and developments from across the country.

programme.title: News Now
programme.desc: Host Shannon Cake brings you live reporting, global field updates and insight-rich interviews shaping the day's high-stakes stories.

programme.title: National Update
programme.desc: Live national headlines, expert interviews and insight into the stories shaping America.

programme.title: John Bachman Now
programme.desc: John Bachman tackles big news from DC, NY and around America.

programme.title: National Desk
programme.desc: Bringing breaking news, investigative reports, and political coverage.

programme.title: Newswire
programme.desc: Up-to-the-minute news updates, in-depth analysis, exclusive interviews and a fresh perspective on the day's top stories and key developments in breaking news, politics and current events.

programme.title: Ike Wingate America
programme.desc: Ike Wingate is a straight shooter who takes the complex stories of the day and lays them out logically and sensibly, making sense of the news.

programme.title: The Todd Starnes Show
programme.desc: Todd Starnes delivers breaking news and commentary covering politics, faith, and culture.

programme.title: Ed Henry: The Briefing
programme.desc: A comprehensive update, offering a dynamic blend of breaking news, political developments and business insights.

programme.title: The Leventhal Report
programme.desc: Rick Leventhal delivers comprehensive analysis and interviews on current affairs and significant events from home and abroad.

programme.title: David Harris Jr. The Pulse
programme.desc: Hard-hitting analysis and opinion on the latest news and events delivered.

programme.title: America's Mayor Live
programme.desc: Former NY Mayor Rudy Giuliani gives insight on leadership, courage and the most pressing issues of our time.

programme.title: The Big Focus
programme.desc: John Bachman focuses on the biggest news from D.C., N.Y., and around America.

programme.title: The Freedom File: Judge Napolitano
programme.desc: Judge Napolitano provides commentary on current events, drawing on his expertise in constitutional law to protect individual freedoms.

programme.title: Stand Up Trump: Making America Fun Again: Draining the Swamp
programme.desc: Donald Trump may have taken many by surprise with his unlikely win of the 2016 presidential election.

programme.title: Ed Henry: The Briefing
programme.desc: A comprehensive update, offering a dynamic blend of breaking news, political developments and business insights.

programme.title: The Leventhal Report
programme.desc: Rick Leventhal delivers comprehensive analysis and interviews on current affairs and significant events from home and abroad.

programme.title: David Harris Jr. The Pulse
programme.desc: Hard-hitting analysis and opinion on the latest news and events delivered.

programme.title: MLK: The Conspiracies
programme.desc: Uncovering the events that unfolded on April 4th, 1968, the day Martin Luther King Jr. was killed.

programme.title: The Plot Against the President
programme.desc: Filmmaker Amanda Milius examines evidence of a conspiracy to sabotage President Donald Trump.

programme.title: Titanic Arrogance
programme.desc: A litany of the human errors that led to the sinking of the British passenger ship in the North Atlantic Ocean on April 15, 1912.

programme.title: This Week on Capitol Hill
programme.desc: An inside look at decision-making in Congress.

programme.desc: The host presents a round-up of the latest social, political and economic news updates and developments from across the country.

programme.title: America's Mayor Live
programme.desc: Former NY Mayor Rudy Giuliani gives insight on leadership, courage and the most pressing issues of our time.

programme.title: Melania Trump: A Very Beautiful First Lady
programme.desc: An intimate look at Melania Trump's journey from her childhood spent in a small Slovenian town to the White House; how she first met Donald Trump and what the new First Lady considers her most precious job.

programme.title: A Climate Conversation
programme.desc: Cuts through the rhetoric and propaganda to ask the simple questions, grounded in science and free of political cheap shots.

programme.title: Ed Henry: The Briefing
programme.desc: A comprehensive update, offering a dynamic blend of breaking news, political developments and business insights.

programme.title: The Leventhal Report
programme.desc: Rick Leventhal delivers comprehensive analysis and interviews on current affairs and significant events from home and abroad.

programme.title: David Harris Jr. The Pulse
programme.desc: Hard-hitting analysis and opinion on the latest news and events delivered.

programme.title: Presidents and UFOs: The Surprising Story
programme.desc: A history of UFO's and Presidents, from George Washington to Donald Trump, with expert testimony, interviews, and reports of personal encounters involving U.S. Presidents and unexplained paranormal phenomena.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: D-9 officers aim to make sure August boaters and tubers are safe during two different summer parties and a look at a class for yoga on paddleboards.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Officers in D-3 and D-5 check on users of off-road vehicles during the Memorial Day weekend.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: As technology advances, manmade accidents have become as destructive as some natural disasters; a look at recent catastrophes.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: Unearthed between 1947 and 1956 in eleven caves in and around the Wadi Qumran are texts of great religious and historical significance, as they are the only known surviving Biblical documents written before AD 100.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: Professor Ehud Netzer and his team search for King Herod's tomb; Dr. Dan Bahat, original archeologist of the Western Wall excavations, goes into the fascinating tunnels under the Temple Mount.

programme.title: Wake Up America Early
programme.desc: Presents news delivering key facts, expert insights, and in-depth analysis to kickstart your day.

programme.title: Wake Up America
programme.desc: Starting the day with real news and analysis.

programme.title: National Report
programme.desc: Your source for up-to-the-minute breaking news; the ideal way to stay informed with eye-opening coverage that makes sense of the stories that affect our lives every day.

programme.title: Bianca Across The Nation
programme.desc: Bianca de la Garza tackles the big news from D.C., N.Y., across America, and around the world!

programme.desc: Bob Brooks and Katrina Szish present news and analysis.

programme.desc: Greta Van Susteren gives the big news from Washington, D.C., New York, across America and around the world.

programme.desc: Ed Henry offers his common-sense take on the news, helping viewers better understand the deeper details behind today's stories.

programme.desc: Carl Higbie gives news analysis as he fights for American values.

programme.title: Caught on Bodycam
programme.desc: Through police bodycam footage, viewers experience the intense moments of a burglary in progress, followed by high-speed chases, and the startling arrest of an officer for DUI.

programme.title: Caught on Bodycam
programme.desc: The human side of policing - sheds light on the challenges, emotions, and ethical dilemmas officers face as they work to protect their communities while confronting their own vulnerabilities.

programme.title: Caught on Bodycam
programme.desc: Candid moments and hilarious interactions where split-second decisions about food can lead to wild confrontations, surprising choices, and unpredictable outcomes.

programme.title: Caught on Bodycam
programme.desc: Pulls back the curtain on the high-stakes world of law enforcement. From routine stops to tense, life-or-death situations - the split-second decisions officers make in the heat of the moment.

programme.title: Securing America
programme.desc: Security expert Frank Gaffney and guests discuss threats facing the United States.

programme.title: Daybreak
programme.desc: Join hosts Steve and Ivie Gruber as they get your day started.

programme.title: American Sunrise
programme.desc: Morning news with the Real America's Voice team live from West Palm Beach, Florida.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: What are you expecting from life? Today, Joyce explains how faith, gratitude and perspective can change the way you approach each day.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.desc: Andrew shares life-changing lessons we can learn from the life of David and how God looks at the heart of men.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Becoming the person God wants you to be and embracing a life beyond amazing.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: Receiving the Lord's freedom, favor and victory through right believing.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Advice for success in life from the book of Proverbs.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: What's holding you back from personal growth? Today, Joyce shares how healthier thinking and better choices can help you mature and move forward.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Being in sync with one's identity in Christ.

programme.title: Hagee Ministries
programme.desc: The mission of John Hagee Ministries is to take the Gospel to all the world and to all generations.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Joel and Victoria Osteen's message of unconditional love and unending hope reaches everyone across the world.

programme.title: Allen Jackson Ministries
programme.desc: What's the best way to prepare for the uncertain future? Trust God with our resources! Pastor Allen Jackson talks about biblical principles surrounding the money, resources, and possessions.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: From Elevation Church in Charlotte, N.C., Pastor Steven Furtick offers inspirational messages through his sermons.

programme.title: Kingdom Connection With Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: A mission to share the profound truths of God's Word; with each episode, viewers are inspired by Franklin Jentezen's words, which echo the timeless wisdom of the scriptures.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Pathway to Victory is the broadcast ministry of Dr. Robert Jeffress and the First Baptist Church of Dallas, Texas. The bold and practical Bible teaching of Pastor Jeffress pierces the darkness with the light of God's Word.

programme.title: Winning Walk
programme.desc: The international teaching ministry of the Rev. Dr. Ed Young, senior pastor of Second Baptist Church in Houston, proclaims the truth of God's word to people throughout the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: What's holding you back from personal growth? Today, Joyce shares how healthier thinking and better choices can help you mature and move forward.

programme.desc: Better Together is an original faith-centered talk show produced by women and just for women.
